description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that includes the built‑in Dependency‑Scanning template (template: Dependency-Scanning.gitlab-ci.yml). This adds the predefined dependency_scanning job which runs in the test stage, uses the default Docker image, scans project dependencies with the appropriate scanner, and uploads the results as a Code Quality report. No additional jobs, stages, variables, caches or rules are defined beyond those provided by the template.
